name: @quoin/tokens-gestalt
description: Pinterest Gestalt design tokens translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Pinterest Gestalt classic base-color tokens extracted from packages/gestalt-design-tokens/tokens/classic/base-color.json. Style Dictionary–shaped JSON with named colour scales (red pushpin, pink flaminglow, etc.). Extraction method: A. Mapping: Gestalt names Pinterest-specific (pushpin red, flaminglow pink, ai blue, masala beige, etc.). Mapping: surface = white, text = darkGray, accent = pushpin.450 (Pinterest red), critical = pushpin.500.
